title: Colorado Springs, CO — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Colorado Springs, CO: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Colorado Springs is a city in CO with a population of 480,000. Front Range city at the foot of Pikes Peak with military bases and outdoor recreation.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
